stories.title: Ryan Fox's Day After — Bordeaux in the Claret Jug, a Flight Home With the Man He Beat

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Ryan Fox still can't explain it. "I'm not quite sure how I hit that putt on 18." The 200-1 longshot who stunned Royal Birkdale poured Bordeaux into the Claret Jug — then boarded a flight to London sitting right next to Cam Young. #TheOpen

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: One more surreal detail from Ryan Fox's Open win: After celebrating at Royal Birkdale, he flew Manchester to London and sat next to runner-up Cam Young. Trophy came too. Fox is bringing the Claret Jug to New Zealand. $3.2M and a Bordeaux toast. #TheOpen

article.headline: Ryan Fox's Day After: Bordeaux in the Claret Jug, a Flight Home With the Man He Beat

stories.title: LIV Golf UK Starts Thursday — But Can It Finish the Season?

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: LIV Golf tees off in England Thursday (JCB Golf & Country Club, July 23-26) — but the circuit's CEO can't guarantee all 4 remaining 2026 events will happen. Saudi PIF has delivered $200M of the $400M needed. The two August events are on thin ice. #LIVGolf

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: LIV Golf's 2026 survival plan: hire Ducera Partners, add independent board directors, cut 2027 calendar to 10 events. Meanwhile, players are quietly reaching out to PGA Tour. The circuit that was going to revolutionize golf is fighting to exist. #LIVGolf

article.headline: LIV Golf UK Starts Thursday, but the Circuit Still Can't Guarantee Its August Events

stories.title: Sam Burns and the Open That Almost Was

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Sam Burns nearly won The Open while his daughter was 2 weeks old. He set records (R2 62 + R3 65 = lowest 2-round stretch in major history), took the 54-hole lead — then made 3 straight bogeys Sunday. His final putt grazed the cup. He finished T3. #TheOpen

article.headline: Sam Burns Nearly Won The Open With a Two-Week-Old Daughter at Home

stories.title: 3M Open Preview — Scheffler Headlines After Open T4

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text: The PGA Tour heads to TPC Twin Cities this week (July 23-26). Scottie Scheffler headlines off a T4 at The Open. Kitayama defends his 2025 title. 500 FedExCup points on the line — one of the final chances to lock up seeding. #3MOpen #PGATour

article.headline: 3M Open Preview: Scheffler Headlines at TPC Twin Cities as FedExCup Clock Ticks

stories.title: PGA Tour Sweeps All Four 2026 Majors — LIV Golf Shut Out Again

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Every 2026 major, won by a PGA Tour member: McIlroy (Masters), Rai (PGA Championship), Clark (US Open), Fox (The Open). LIV Golf: 0 major wins. The shutout comes as the circuit faces its deepest financial crisis. Golf's competitive divide is real. #PGATour #LIVGolf

article.headline: PGA Tour Sweeps All Four 2026 Majors as LIV Golf Faces Its Deepest Crisis
